title: Green Globe Pack 6 Ceramic Rice Party Bowls 10 oz with Chopsticks | Serving Fruit Bowl Gift Set, Assorted Dinnerware Cereal Soup Dessert Snack Salsa (Bohemian)
features: HEALTHY MATERIAL: The bowl set is made of ceramic, non-toxic and safe to serve food everyday, the smooth, chip-resistant glazed surface is easy to clean

BOHEMIAN STYLE: Classic white striped texture outside offering non-slip hand grabbing, and gorgeous Bohemian style geometric pattern inside, make a nice-looking bowl set that would display food well and light up your dinning table
STANDARD SIZE: 4.5" in diameter x 2.3" in height, each bowl can hold maximum 10oz / 300ml, ideal for rice, cereal, noodle, soup, ramen, salad, dessert, fruit, snack, or dips, salsa and guacamole
CONVENIENT USAGE: Suitable for microwave, oven, freezer, dishwasher or quick hand wash, which is convenient for everyday use
PERFECT FOR: Assorted 6-pack is perfect for families then each one have their own bowl in special pattern. Also great for a lovely housewarming gift or holiday present
